sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n100811" key="suno/ktw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνόκτω</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">οἱ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">αἱ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen>, <sense id="n100811.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">eight together, by eights</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1682.tlg001:20" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sopat.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">20</biblScope> </bibl> (divisim, dub. l.).</sense> </entryFree>
